Document:
# Station Alert - Omicron - RAGNARÖK
[italic]Called by: Sector Command Only.[/italic]
[bold]Conditions:[/bold]
Sector Command has decided to take direct control of the station.
[bold]Security:[/bold]
All security members are to de-arm and await further instructions from Sector Command.
[bold]Secure Areas:[/bold]
All Secure Areas are to be bolted down.
[bold]General Crew:[/bold]
All personnel must maximise their suit sensors.
All personnel should remain in their department, and await further orders.
Personnel are required to follow all Sector Command orders.
